title: Morning Mist
description: A tranquil early morning scene where golden light filters through a pine forest and kisses the still surface of a mountain lake. The world is suspended between night and day, wrapped in a soft luminous haze.

title: Golden Fields
description: Endless wheat fields stretching to the horizon beneath a dramatic summer sky. Painted entirely en plein air over three sessions, this work captures the restless energy of wind moving through ripe grain.

title: Crimson Tide
description: An exploration of raw emotional energy through bold gestural mark-making. Layers of crimson, sienna, and deep gold build upon each other, creating a surface that rewards close inspection with hidden depth.

title: Winter Silence
description: A hushed European village after snowfall. Warm amber light spills from windows into the cold blue dusk. This painting is an ode to the quiet beauty found in ordinary winter evenings.

title: Evening Solitude
description: A study in light and character. Using dramatic chiaroscuro reminiscent of the Old Masters, this portrait seeks to capture not just a face but an inner world — thoughtful, self-contained, and deeply present.

title: Autumn Bloom
description: An elaborate bouquet of late-season roses, peonies, and tulips arranged in a ceramic vase. Painted in the tradition of the Dutch Golden Age, with careful attention to the interplay of light, shadow, and botanical detail.

title: Coastal Fire
description: The moment before sunset on the Atlantic coast — when the cliffs glow orange and the sea turns to molten copper. Painted in a single session to capture the urgency and splendor of a sky in flux.

title: Azure Depths
technique: Oil and cold wax on board
description: Built up through dozens of translucent layers of cobalt, ultramarine, and cerulean, this work evokes deep water, open sky, and states of contemplative stillness. The encaustic-like surface invites the viewer to lean in.
